title: Child Protection and Care Services Mission and Vision
content:
Child Protection and Care Services Mission and Vision

Our Vision

To be a program that has the knowledge and skills required to work in the field, can contribute to the development of social welfare, human rights and social justice, trains technicians needed by the society, assumes and maintains a leading role in the field of education and training quality at national and international level.

Our Mission

In public, private and/or non-governmental organizations, it can support the development of children aged 0-18 in need of protection and at risk in a holistic way, direct, maintain and evaluate the studies, contribute to the development of child and family welfare, and contribute to the development of children, family, education and society. Training of qualified technicians to take part in projects.
